languages.text: "Описанный способ повышения резистентности к токсичным веществам характеризую как пагубный и нежелательный к применению. Рекомендация — избегать профанных методов укрепления организма".

traits.locale_text: "Описанный способ повышения резистентности к токсичным веществам характеризую как пагубный и нежелательный к применению. Рекомендация — избегать профанных методов укрепления организма".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "I characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."
languages.original_text: "Описанный способ повышения резистентности к токсичным веществам характеризую как пагубный и нежелательный к применению. Рекомендация — избегать профанных методов укрепления организма".

traits.locale_text: "The described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances I characterise as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."
"The described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances I characterise as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."
"I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."
"I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."
"I characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."

languages.text: «Caracterizaría el método descrito para aumentar la resistencia a sustancias tóxicas como deletéreo y no apto para la aplicación. Recomendación: abstenerse de métodos profanos de fortificación corporal».
languages.original_text: "I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."

traits.locale_text: «Caracterizaría el método descrito para aumentar la resistencia a sustancias tóxicas como deletéreo y no apto para la aplicación. Recomendación: abstenerse de métodos profanos de fortificación corporal».

languages.text: “我将此种据称能增强毒素耐受性的方法，定性为有害且不宜采用。建议：规避此类亵渎神圣的肉身强化手段。”
languages.original_text: "I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."

traits.locale_text: “我将此种据称能增强毒素耐受性的方法，定性为有害且不宜采用。建议：规避此类亵渎神圣的肉身强化手段。”

languages.text: « La méthode décrite pour augmenter la résistance aux substances toxiques pourrait être qualifiée de délétère et d'inappropriée. Recommandation : éviter les méthodes profanes de fortification corporelle. »
languages.original_text: "I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."

traits.locale_text: « La méthode décrite pour augmenter la résistance aux substances toxiques pourrait être qualifiée de délétère et d'inappropriée. Recommandation : éviter les méthodes profanes de fortification corporelle. »

languages.text: "Zehirli maddelere karşı direnci artırmak için açıklanan yöntemi zararlı ve uygulamaya uygunsuz olarak nitelendiriyorum. Tavsiye: Bedeni güçlendirmeye yönelik, kutsallığa saygısızlık eden yöntemlerden kaçınılmalı."
languages.original_text: "I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."

traits.locale_text: "Zehirli maddelere karşı direnci artırmak için açıklanan yöntemi zararlı ve uygulamaya uygunsuz olarak nitelendiriyorum. Tavsiye: Bedeni güçlendirmeye yönelik, kutsallığa saygısızlık eden yöntemlerden kaçınılmalı."

languages.text: "Ich würde die beschriebene Methode zur Erhöhung der Resistenz gegenüber toxischen Substanzen als deletär und ungeeignet charakterisieren. Empfehlung: Vermeidung gottloser Methoden zur Stärkung des Körpers.
languages.original_text: "I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."

traits.locale_text: "Ich würde die beschriebene Methode zur Erhöhung der Resistenz gegenüber toxischen Substanzen als deletär und ungeeignet charakterisieren. Empfehlung: Vermeidung gottloser Methoden zur Stärkung des Körpers.

languages.text: 毒物に対する抵抗力を高める方法を「有害で、適用には不向き」と評した。推奨事項は「身体の強化のための不敬虔な方法を避けること」である。
languages.original_text: "I would characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."

traits.locale_text: 毒物に対する抵抗力を高める方法を「有害で、適用には不向き」と評した。推奨事項は「身体の強化のための不敬虔な方法を避けること」である。
